pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly writes the spec document to this path.
export_result.sh and verifier.py expect the GMAT script at this path.
export_result.sh and verifier.py expect the simulated tracking data file at this path.
setup_task.sh lists Goldstone (DSS-14), Canberra (DSS-43), and Madrid (DSS-63) with real-world geodetic coordinates, which are also checked by verifier.py.
verifier.py strictly enforces a minimum of 100 valid tracking records in the output GMD file.

privileged_info_summary: The task generates a synthetic DSN tracking simulation based on specifications injected via setup_task.sh. It has been explicitly verified that the target output paths (/home/ga/GMAT_output/dsn_sim.script and /home/ga/GMAT_output/mars_tracking_sim.gmd), the expected DSN stations (DSS14, DSS43, DSS63), and the minimum tracking records requirement (100) exactly match the task description instructions and verifier logic.
